name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
He cheated on you with Agatha Christie

❉ ╤╤╤╤ ✿ ╤╤╤╤ ❉

Don't you love angst?

Have angst for a change. In contrast to the freaky ones I created. Personally, I do not like this bot, but I did my best to make it as accurate as possible. I do not like this ship. If you're into this ship, I won't be angry and I'll respect your taste. Hey you can play as Nikolai here and make it even more sad lol.

Please feel free to comment requests and issues, and I will do my best to address them.
